expectations.text: Discovers and lists the skills found
expectations.evidence: Lists all 19 skills with ratings in summary table
Uses accessible language, tier-based ratings (Strong/Solid/Needs Work), practical recommendations
Each skill has individual rating with notes and specific improvement suggestions
Priority recommendations section with P0/P1/P2/P3 tiers
Uses Rating column and Category (CI/CD, Workflow, Tool wrapper, etc.) but not the 9-category taxonomy
